title: Pollachius Potens
description: Vibrant Boxy Squares Minecraft Resource Pack
body:
Pollachius Potens is the ultimate 16x16 upgrade to the [Pollachius](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pollachius) 8x8 pack—delivering a clean, boxy aesthetic with sharp squares and grid-like vibes that make every block pop. This pack keeps things simple, vivid, and true to vanilla while adding a geometric twist that's perfect for modern Minecraft worlds.

Over 3K+ downloads on CurseForge and growing—join the Pollachius family (100K+ total across variants) for that fresh, enjoyable look!

**Why Pollachius Potens is a Must-Have 16x16 Pack**

Boxy & square-focused: Bold geometry and clean lines for standout builds & landscapes
Vibrant palette: Vivid, limited colors for a cohesive, retro-inspired style
Full vanilla overhaul: Blocks, items, mobs, GUIs—everything reimagined simply & sharply
Lightweight & versatile: Great for survival, creative, PVP clarity, or modded play

**Permissions & Usage Guidelines**

You MAY:
- Use in videos, streams, screenshots, or other content (YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, etc.) — as long as you provide proper credit by linking back to the pack.

You MAY NOT:
- Redistribute or re-upload this resource pack (or any part of it) in any form, including on other sites, servers, or file hosts.
- Create, distribute, or share modified versions, derivatives, ports (e.g., to Bedrock), adaptations, or "remixes" of Splotch.
- Use for any commercial purposes (monetized servers, paid content, merchandise, etc.).
